articles.author: Kenton Gewecke
articles.title: More than 125 million Americans under dangerous heat coast to coast - Yahoo
articles.description: Cities in North Dakota, South Dakota and Minnesota saw daily records on Monday.
articles.content: More than 125 million Americans are on alert for sweltering coast-to-coast temperatures, as heat alerts are in place from Southern California to the intermountain West and northern Plains, upper Midw… [+4348 chars]
